commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete pod nixl-probe --ignore-not-found 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/launcher-v2.yaml && echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/disagg-1p1d.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/launcher-v2.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods 2>&1'
